reviews.title: doesn't stay on securely
reviews.text: I've purchased one of these in the past and liked it, but the gold color faded so I l reordered another it in black. However, this time, one side kept disconnecting and the attachment site looked defective compared to the other side causing me to almost lose my Fitbit twice. Luckily, I was indoors and heard it drop. I will return it and try a different brand as I fear I will encounter this issue again if I simply replace it.  This style is nice because it's easy to put on and off even with a single hand as opposed to the type of bracelet that comes with the Fitbit.

reviews.title: Worried the magnet will damage device
reviews.text: I wanted a band that would have more variability in fit, and I liked the color, so I ordered this.  It is, indeed, compatible with the Fitbit Sense and I enjoyed it for several days until I had to charge my Sense.  I then discovered that the magnet was so strong that I had difficulty keeping it off the back of my device long enough to get the charger on.  I was worried that strong magnet might damage the circuits and contacted FitBit for their opinion.  They weren't sure, but pointed out that they do have a hook-and-loop wristband in-house that is available.  Since I was also having trouble with the edges of the VNCAS band getting caught on my wool shawl and anything else fuzzy I wore, I decided to ditch it for the FitBit brand option.  Sorry, but I can't recommend this one.

reviews.title: Not Well Made😳
reviews.text: Initially when I bought this watch band, I thought it was nice, solid and seemed to be well made. I've been wearing it just a little over 2 months now and there's some sharp little burrs that have now showed up on the watch band itself and the edges of the other parts are now seeming to be sharp as well and keep getting hung up on my clothing and have also scratched my boyfriend several times. The finish is wearing off on the backside of the magnet connector area so now it looks very tarnished. I do wear it everyday all day long, but I don't feel after such a short period of time it should look so bad and have these sharp edges now. Unfortunately it's past my return window so I'm going to have to just throw it away and get another one. Such a shame because I really like the magnetic band and the color. I'm a little bit leery about buying another similar style for fear that the same thing will happen again. 😳

reviews.title: Cute but it snags
reviews.text: It snags on everything. Ugh. So I can't wear it with nice blouses or sweaters it gets caught and causes holes, runs, etc. Otherwise I love it.

reviews.title: Like the fact that it's magnetic
reviews.text: Be careful since it's magnetic it may stick to your silverware or metal objects

reviews.title: Nice looking but---
reviews.text:
Just received yesterday so can't comment on accuracy yet. Got watch set up through app with no problems. Then the maddening part-One of reasons I ordered this watch was watch face on Amazon pictures. Well, I scrolled down through all the faces on the app 4 times and the shown watch face was not even there for download-What the hell!!!!! I've ordered 6 or 7 smart watches and this is the first one without magnetic charging cable. Has this plastic thingy at end of cord you have to push watch down into in order to charge. Don't like this at all. Haven't decided whether to keep or not but not off to a good start.
After a few days another problem. Battery charge on watch shows 100% all the time even after 2 days of wearing. Impossible for battery level not to go down somewhat if not a lot. Returning.

reviews.title: Cheap watch with premium features!
reviews.text:
I own several smart watches only because I like different styles. I have to say this one is very stylish and elegant. Works very well and has tons of features. The watch band feels strong and durable.

Some of the reading features such as the blood pressure monitor is not 100 percent accurate but pretty close compared to a cuff system.

Battery last a few days before needing a charge again. It’s also IP68, has music control once paired to your phone, heart rate monitor, blood oxygen readings, call & text notifications, and so much more!

If you are looking for a smart watch that would not break the bank, then this is it! Go and get yourself one of these today! It’s highly recommended!

reviews.title: I wanted to love it
reviews.text: It really isn't the watches fault that I returned it.  It did all it said it would do, the Alexa feature worked, the heart rate monitor worked , the picture was bright, among other things. I didn't like that if you use the timer ( which I use frequently at my job) you can't go back to the main screen, if you do it turns off the timer, but you can use Alexa as a timer and don't have to stay on the same screen so there is a work around. I was also dissapointed with the fact there were only 4 face choices.  But, the reason I returned it is that my phone is older and it wears down my battery quickly and was causing cpu (?) overload warnings.

reviews.title: Solid watch
reviews.text:
Watch came well packaged and was easy to set up and pair using the provided instructions on the item page. It was made well and kept good time. I have a Motorola phone and it would not stay paired with my phone. The sleep feature never seemed to work because it was constantly disconnecting from the app. It may be a good choice for someone else, but I returned it.

The battery life was excellent and it was a well constructed and comfortable watch

reviews.title: Great looking watch, battery life isn't what I expected
reviews.text: The major feature that seems missing from this watch is sleep tracking.  Reviews of the watch point to the limited battery life of the watch, and not being enough to track though an average night's sleep.

reviews.title: Measure your wrist before you buy.
reviews.text:
The blue silicone band was too small to go around my wrist. I called Skagen and they offered to sell me a bigger band. I told them I shouldn't have to pay extra for the watch to go on my wrist. They said since I bought it from Amazon there was nothing they could do. So sadly, this is getting returned.
I've worn plenty of watches before, and I don't have a fatty wrist. My wrist is 8 inches in circumference, which is average for a male.
The interesting thing about the size as I inspected and measured the watch, is that if you measure the watch laid out flat, 8 inches goes to the second to last notch, and it should fit fine. BUT -- the watch body itself obviously does not bend, which means in actual wear when the watch goes AROUND your wrist, you need an additional 3/4 to 1 inch for it to work.
It's basically like that one gallon jug I bought at Walmart, I got it home to make a drink mix in it just to realize that yes, it held one gallon, if you filled it to the absolute brim, at which point putting in the drink mix made it spill.
If your wrist is greater than 7 inches in circumference, I would not buy this watch.

Activity tracker fitness watch and Life assistant: This step counter watch supports 20types of fitness trackers, such as Walking, Running, Cycling, Skipping, Badminton, Basketball, and Football. Recording your steps, distance, calories, etc activity data. It can also work as an assistant: music and camera control, weather display, sedentary reminder, drink water reminder, alarm clock, stopwatch, find phone, which help you live a convenient life.

Great Battery Life & IP68 Waterproof Smart Watch: When fully-charged, this watch can last for up to5~ 7 days or 20 days standby time. With IP68 waterproof, this fitness watch can meet the waterproof requirements of your daily activities such as washing hands or working out in the rain with it.

1.32 Inch Full-touch Screen & Custom Watch Face: The watch with 1.32 inch LCD screen can provide you with high-quality touch and visual experience. Five levels of brightness options allow you to easily read information in the sun or dark. Also you can choose a picture you like to customize the watch face in Movwing App.

reviews.title: Seems to work pretty well for the most part
reviews.text: Setup was easy with a quick app download and it paired with my iPhone 12 without any drama. Biometric tracking seems to work reasonably well with the exception of heart rate, which seems to always read 70 no matter what I'm doing. I'm not too crazy about the aesthetic of the watch, it just looks kind of cheap to me. I got this mainly to use as a health tracking tool and to tell time, not to make and receive calls/texts with, so I haven't setup any of those features yet and may never get around to doing so. So i can't comment on ease of use for any of those features. I did like that there are quite a lot of different watch face designs that can be applied and without any additional purchase. For the price of around $40, this is a pretty smokin' deal for a smart watch, I think.

reviews.title: Not bad for the price
reviews.text:
I’ve tried a few different affordable watches and my biggest issue has been the charging port. They have trouble staying connected with tiny pins and no magnetic pull. So going into this I’m more critical.
Upside is there is definitely a better charging system. It holds in place nicely even though it’s a pretty small pin area it is easier to charge.
The screen does have low sensitivity response. When pairing it it took 3 tries to get it recognize I had tapped the screen.
On a good note it’s reading well and has some great features like heart rate, oxygen, and sleep. Everything lined up well with my normal statistics so I feel it’s pretty accurate.
There’s a variety of images to choose from so you can customize the screen however you would like.
It’s very comfortable. The band holds like a premium watch band. It has a large face that is classy. Aesthetically it’s very nice.
Overall for an affordable smart watch it’s a decent option.

reviews.title: Okay tracker
reviews.text: For the price, it is an okay tracker.  The microphone on the watch is not of great quality as I was told sounded muffled on it.  It does have a lot of features and was quite easy to use but nothing about it made it stand out from the other hundreds of smart watches out on the market.

reviews.title: Cute watch is all I can say
reviews.text: Initially the watch was quick to charge and holds the charge for a couple of days.  The functions were easy to use, and a lot to choose from for the activities I do.  I mainly track my steps, distance, duration, heart rate.  It worked well for a few weeks, then I took it swimming for a few laps in the pool.  That was a mistake, battery stopped working (won't charge anymore).  Sad, I really liked the watch, it's cute but the battery died.

reviews.title: Great Smart watch for the essentials
reviews.text:
I was looking for a good smart watch for my mother. She was a Fitbit user but her Fitbit died after years of use and wanted something with a similar feel.
This watch really worked out for her.
It's got a great screen and a good amount of apps to provide essential uses.
It's able to work with iOS and Android.
It's able to get notifications from apps and make phone calls.
Not a bad product at all.

reviews.title: fitbit 3 perforated bands
reviews.text: I purchased these after market bands because the 'large' I got with my fitbit 3 was WAY too big.  It's amazing how much better 1" less in the band fits.  It comes with three colors.  The only thing I am not really super happy about is the silver tone buckle - I am nervous about nickle content as it is an allergy thing for me. The original is black and matches the band. You get 3 full bands, One black... one gray.. and one light aqua blue - it's more of a very light gray blue.  They are a rubbery ? silicone like? material. Smooth, no sharp edges.  They attached easily. So far, so good.  Having said that, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

reviews.title: Perfect replacement
reviews.text: Exact replacement and a fraction of the price you would pay if you bought it from the store

reviews.title: Blue is more purple
reviews.text: The blue is more purple than it is blue. The color was mostly true to its display photo though, but just a word of caution in case if anyone really wanted a true blue. As for the band itself, I can’t say much about durability since I just installed it. This band comes with 2 securing bands whereas the original Garmin comes with 1. I also feel like the band doesn’t meet flush with the watch face as well as the original Garmin but it’s not bad. This band is also a little stiffer than the floppy Garmin band, and I think I actually like the feel of this stiffer band.

reviews.title: Fits 45s perfectly
reviews.text: Worked perfectly as a replacement band for the 45s. Not sure why other reviewers are having issues because it’s great!

reviews.title: I wanted the teal specifically
reviews.text: I replaced my watch band as soon as they came and it's been on since summer with no complaints.  I appreciate the fact that they send a little screwdriver with the set, it's so helpful not having to find something that small on your own.  Nice product!

reviews.title: Keep track
reviews.text: This fitness tracker is simple to setup and in no time it'll be keeping track of your health so you have a monitor of what you do every day. It's simple to track and manage your sleep patterns or steps you take in a day. Very simple to use mobile app. The watch lasts a long time before dieing at least 2 days

reviews.title: Super impressed with this watch. Truly remarkable
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:ae47b9651b52b2c1b0485219f33680bf]] Wow. I am not impressed by much, but this watch is truly impressive for this price point.

Build: Very good build quality. The waterproof case feels solid, with responsive buttons and full color high res screen. Bracelet is soft rubber and is very comfortable. It's a very large band, so large or small wrists will fit in here.

Features: Though not perfect, the features on this watch are impressive. Measures steps, activities, heart rate, laps, sleep quality. Very very nice featuers. Plus it's waterproof!!!

Cons: Some of the interfaces are a bit clunky, and the app could use work, but it's fairly intuitive, and easy to use. I connected to my Galaxy S7 with no problems.

I recommend this watch!

reviews.title: My favorite budget smart watch
reviews.text:
I've tried a variety of budget smart watches, and this one by Dr.Viva has become my favorite. It's very comfortable, great flexible band, no issues with feeling like it's pressing into my wrist bones. The screen display is a good size without being too large, perfect for smaller wrists.

The Zeroner app has been fantastic, no problems. It accurately tracks my steps, sleep & oxygen. I like how it has a variety of exercises for me to document. The battery life is a big winner. I recharge the smart watch once a week, compared to twice a week with the other watches I've tried before. I was disappointed that I don't have the option to have my own picture as the screen display, but the app still has plenty of screens to choose from.

If you're like me and don't want to spend an exorbitant price on a smart watch, but would still like to enjoy the features of a smart watch this one would be a great option.

reviews.title: Inaccurate
reviews.text: This is a cute watch. Set up was simple. I liked the pink band and it was comfortable. The multi-lingual instructions are useless. Even worse it is inaccurate. I was at my desk and took it off. When I came back it said I logged 1800 steps.  It was sitting in the same place on the desk. Not. Back to my fit bit.

reviews.title: Very Durable and Love the Face
reviews.text:
The watch and band are more durable than I expected at this price point. The watch is very easy to install and should not take more than 5 minutes. For some reason I really like the aesthetics on the face of the watch.

I have another watch that is comparable and this watch costs 25% less. This is definitely good value. A watch like this is a game changer for people monitoring heart issues. Highly recommend.

reviews.title: Easy set up and can text and phone calls
reviews.text: I like the looks and it tells me to get off my ass and move.

reviews.title: Decently priced
reviews.text: Chose this watch because of the simplicity and overall look.  The step counts and sleep features work very well.  Battery life is approximately 2 days use when using the push button feature.  If you enable the sensor to come on with your wrist approximately 1 day use.  Charge works very well and quickly.  The downfall is definitely the rubber banding.  The piece that holds the excess band tends to move.  Call feature is ok for the price and messaging is ok.  I primarily needed for an alarm, clock and date.

reviews.title: great smartwatch
reviews.text: I bought this for my uncle for his birthday. He wanted a smart watch to monitor his health. He liked it and it was easy for him to set up.

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text: I had an Apple Watch before this. This is really no different than the Apple Watch,  everything that worked on there works fine here! Did find a screen protector  it is (Smaat 1.7”) it fits perfect! And touch screen still works fine. as far as I can tell there are no other bands made for this type of connection, which is kind of ridiculous. So if the band breaks, you literally have to buy a new watch don’t like that! Also, wish it could at least have the temperature on the screen! And there are only certain screens that have the power level or day and date, and you cannot pick a screen from your photos, etc. and add the date. Just trying to inform people of all of the things that I was looking for in reviews and no one ever mentioned any of these hopefully it helps!

reviews.title: Nice watch!
reviews.text: I bought this watch to track my fitness mainly.  I'm not the type of person who's into gadgets per se but I think this is a winner.  It's not expensive but still stylish and functional.

24 Sports Modes Smartwatch: The smartwatch accurately tracks your activities. The watch has 24 custom training modes (ball games/treadmill/swimming record/cycling/yoga, etc.). It tracks your activities in real time, such as steps, calories burned, kilometers traveled. Men's and women's smartwatches can connect to your smartphone's GPS to track your speed and distance traveled. By pressing the "sports button" on the watch, you can switch to sports mode in a second.

Message notifications and durable battery: Whenever you receive notifications from your smartphone, such as text messages, incoming calls or APP notifications, your smartwatch will vibrate gently to remind you of important messages and notifications. You can also personalize app notifications you want to sync or not in App GloryFit. Also, Canspot Men's Ladies Watches have excellent battery life of up to 10-15 days. Charging time is about 2-3 hours.

Heart Rate and Sleep Monitor: The smart watch accurately monitors your heart rate in real time through the optical sensor, 24 hours continuously, calories, steps will also be recorded in the smart watch throughout the day. All data will also be recorded in the smartwatch throughout the day for over 30 days. Based on your heart rate, sleep duration and level of irritability, personalised data can help you instantly improve your sleep quality and lifestyle.

IP67 Waterproof Strap Interchangeable Strap: The smart watch is compatible with at least Android 4.4 and iOS 8.0. Water resistant to 5 meters, you can wear the watch while swimming, bathing and washing your hands without worry (not suitable for use in hot and salty environments). The smartwatch comes with 2 straps, which means you don't need to buy replacements. The strap is very easy to install and remove.

reviews.title: Excellent value for price
reviews.text: I would describe this watch as something for health purposes rather that physical training. I really like the heart rate, blood pressure, and sleep tracker. Pedometer is also pretty accurate. I wish there were more color schemes. Overall it’s a great dupe for an iWatch or Samsung watch for 1/10th of a price.

title: LFUTARI Smart Watch Compatible with iPhone and Android Phones, Fitness Tracker with Heart Rate Monitor, Sleep Monitor & Blood Oxygen Saturation, 5ATM Waterproof Smartwatch for Women Men - Black
description: ※※※Please carefully read the User Manual before using it. Any questions, please feel free to contact the seller for help. (Go to Your Order, Find the order ID in the list, Click 'Contact with us'). ※※※ 【14 Sports Modes】 Including Outdoor Run, Outdoor Walk, Outdoor Cycle, Indoor Run, Indoor Cycle, Hiking, Yoga, Rowing Machine, Elliptical Machine, Dynamic Cycling, Cricket, Pool Swimming, Open Swimming and Others. 【Sedentary Reminders】 Reminds you to stand up and move when you are busy at work or sit for a long time. 【Alarm Clocks】 You can set up to 10 alarms easily for everyday tasks such as waking up, appointments, and more. 【Deep Breath Guide】 Our fitness watch can guide your breathing and help you find moments of calm throughout the day, making you feel relaxed. 【Control your Music】 You can control the up/down song, volume up/down of the current player directly through the watch, it's helpful when you are on the go or when your phone is not at hand. Smart Phone System Requirements iOS 11.0 & higher Android 6.0 & higher Bluetooth 4.0 & below Specifications Sync: Bluetooth 5.0 Screen: 1.3" TFT LCD Battery Capacity: 210mAh Working Voltage: 5V-500mA Working Temperature: -10℃ to 40℃ Weight: 1.27oz (36g) Waterproof Rating: 5ATM Working Time: 5-7 days What's in the Box? Smartwatch with bands  Charging cable User manual Quick start guide ※※※Please note: Smart watch data cannot be used for medical purposes. The monitoring data is for reference only. If you need medical help, please contact a professional doctor.※※※
features: 【Smart Watch for Men and Women】Features a 1.3-inch TFT-LCD full touch screen with a simple and vivid interface. 5 levels of brightness are available so you can easily view the screen in sunlight, and it will auto adjust brightness at night with night mode on. The screen lights up automatically when you lift and turn your wrist. Skin-friendly and soft bands fit different wrist sizes.

【All Day Activity Tracking】Supports 14 sports including walking, running, cycling, yoga, swimming and more. Accurately record all-day activities such as steps, distance, calories burned, miles walked, active minutes. Connect your GPS on your smartphone to see your real-time pace and distance during your outdoor activities and record your workout route map in the app.

【Healthy in Every Day】the latest advanced sensor for accurately monitor your real-time heart rate, blood oxygen (SpO2) level. Auto-track analyze your sleep quality(deep sleep, light sleep and wake up time) to help you get a better understanding of your health and and make reasonable adjustment on your lifestyle.

【5ATM Waterproof & Long Battery Life】Enjoy up to 7 days extra-long battery life, and our fitness tracker watch is designed with 5ATM waterproof, which means you can wear it without worries even while swimming. This watch also has many pratical tools such as alarm clock, music controller, deep breathing guide, sedentary reminder, stopwatch, timer and more.

【Smartwatches for Android IOS Phones】Compatible with most iOS 11.0 and Android 6.0 above, Bluetooth 4.0 below smartphones. Download and install our custom app (please check page 5 of the manual for details), bind this smartwatch to your phone, you can receive alerts of calendar, incoming calls, SMS, APP notifications and SNS (Messenger, WhatsApp, Skype, Twitter, etc) and preview the messages, never let you miss anything important things (note: you can't reply to messages or make calls).

【Multiple Dials & Custom Watchface】this smartwatch itself comes with 3 default dials, you can change it via watch's setting page. Also there are 14 dials in the dial gallery in our custom app, you can go download and install them to your watch at any time, and you can also choose a photo from your phone album as the background of your watch.

reviews.title: Useful smartwatch
reviews.text: Battery life is good! Lasts as long as advertised. BPM seems accurate. I can manage my basic music controls. The watch face is a bit small. This would be great for a child. The app is the true star and it connects to Google Fit.
